title: Cosmic Microwave Background
description: About 380,000 years after the Big Bang, the universe cools enough for atoms to form and light to travel freely.

title: First Stars
description: First generation of stars ignite, ending the cosmic dark ages.

title: First Galaxies
description: Infant galaxies begin assembling a few hundred million years after the Big Bang.

title: Milky Way Forms
description: Our galaxy begins to take shape from gas clouds and early mergers.

title: Solar System Forms
description: Sun and planets coalesce from a protoplanetary disk.

title: Moon Forms
description: A Mars-sized body collides with Earth, ejecting debris that becomes the Moon.

title: Milky Way-Andromeda Collision
description: The Milky Way and Andromeda are expected to make their first major collision about 4 billion years from now.

title: Sun Becomes Red Giant
description: In about 5 billion years, the Sun is expected to swell into a red giant as it runs low on core hydrogen.

title: Milky Way-Andromeda Merge
description: Roughly 6 billion years from now, the Milky Way and Andromeda are expected to merge into one larger galaxy.

title: Sun Becomes White Dwarf
description: After its red giant phase, the Sun is expected to end as a white dwarf in about 10 billion years.
